data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: The design is optimized such that frequently used buttons are larger and easier to click.
data.technical_spec: Interface components are designed with ample size and intuitive positioning.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Limiting choices and making each action as straightforward as possible to reduce decision time.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined menu design with concise options for quick decision-making.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Users spend most of their time on other sites; thus, WhatsApp follows interface conventions for familiarity.
data.technical_spec: Adopts common interface elements and interaction patterns familiar to users.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: A visually appealing interface enhances the perceived usability of the app.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates high-resolution images, smooth transitions, and a cohesive color palette.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Elements that are related are placed close together to reduce cognitive load.
data.technical_spec: Content grouping and alignment strategies used in chat layouts and menus.
